reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.9.7: hybrid canvas optimization in the main app. Brush and eraser strokes now melt into a single raster canting-layer bitmap instead of creating one object per stroke, so drawing stays light no matter how many strokes. All other elements (cap, motif, imported images, shapes) remain objects, and the file stays .batikcraft (the bitmap is just one PNG per layer inside the archive).
